document.title: Content-Based Router
document.summary: Routes a message to the correct channel based on the message content.
document.implementation: Processing.Routing.ContentBasedRouter evaluates message properties and routes to destination channels.

document.title: Message Filter
document.summary: Eliminates undesired messages from a channel based on criteria.
document.implementation: Processing.Routing.MessageFilter applies predicate-based filtering to discard or redirect messages.

document.title: Dynamic Router
document.summary: A router that can self-configure based on control messages from participating destinations.
document.implementation: Processing.Routing.DynamicRouter maintains a dynamic routing table updated at runtime via control messages.

document.title: Recipient List
document.summary: Routes a message to a list of dynamically specified recipients.
document.implementation: Processing.Routing.RecipientListRouter sends copies to each recipient in the list.

document.title: Splitter
document.summary: Breaks a composite message into individual messages, each containing one item.
document.implementation: Processing.Splitter splits batch messages into individual IntegrationEnvelopes.

document.title: Aggregator
document.summary: Combines multiple related messages into a single message.
document.implementation: Processing.Aggregator collects messages by correlation ID and merges when completeness condition is met.

document.title: Resequencer
document.summary: Puts out-of-order messages back into the correct sequence.
document.implementation: Processing.Resequencer.MessageResequencer uses SequenceNumber to buffer and emit messages in order.

document.title: Composed Message Processor
document.summary: Split a composite message, process each part individually, then aggregate the results.
document.implementation: Splitter + Transform + Aggregator pipeline composed in Temporal workflow activities.

document.title: Scatter-Gather
document.summary: Broadcast a message to multiple recipients and re-aggregate the responses.
document.implementation: Processing.ScatterGather sends to parallel recipients and aggregates responses with timeout.

document.title: Routing Slip
document.summary: Attach a routing slip to each message specifying the sequence of processing steps.
document.implementation: Processing.Routing.RoutingSlipRouter reads the slip from message headers and forwards to the next step.

document.title: Process Manager
document.summary: A central coordinator that manages the state and sequencing of a multi-step business process.
document.implementation: Temporal Workflows act as process managers — maintaining state, handling signals, and orchestrating activities.

document.title: Message Broker
document.summary: A central component that decouples senders from receivers. The platform IS the message broker.
document.implementation: The EnterpriseIntegrationPlatform itself acts as the message broker — Kafka, NATS, and Temporal together provide complete broker functionality.
